name: ILSetCANFDParam
title: ILSetCANFDParam
syntax: long ILSetCANFDParam(dword ID, int FDF, int BRS, int DLC)
long ILSetCANFDParam(dbMsg msg, int FDF, int BRS, int DLC)
description: The function allows setting of CAN FD parameters for a specific message.

parameters.name: ID
parameters.description: CAN-ID of message that should be modified.

parameters.name: FDF
parameters.description: -2: reset FDF setting of message according to database-1: do not change FDF setting of message0: FDF off1: FDF onThis parameter has highest priority and will overrule settings for BRS and DLC, i.e. BRS = 0 and max DLC = 8 in case that FDF off.

parameters.name: BRS
parameters.description: -2: reset BRS settings of message according to database-1: do not change BRS setting of message0: BRS off1: BRS on

parameters.name: DLC
parameters.description: -2: reset DLC settings of message according to database-1: do not change DLC setting of message≥0: set DLC of message to specified value

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
